# Klean - Smart & Fast Windows Optimizer

Klean is a modern, premium-looking desktop application built with Electron, Express, and PowerShell to help you clean, optimize, and monitor your Windows system. Unlike typical cleaning software, Klean offers specialized tools like **Orphaned MSI/MSP Installer Quarantine**, alongside classic junk file cleanup, startup management, and real-time performance monitoring.

---

## 🚀 Key Features

*   **System Cleaner**:
    *   **System Temp**: Safely clears temporary files generated by Windows and apps.
    *   **Windows Update Cache**: Stops `wuauserv` temporarily to clean outdated update caches.
    *   **Delivery Optimization Cache**: Clears updates shared with other PCs on your local network.
    *   **Recycle Bin**: Empties your trash permanently.
    *   **Orphaned Installers (MSI/MSP)**: Quarantine broken, redundant, or orphaned installers from `C:\Windows\Installer` to free up gigabytes of storage.
    *   **Deep Optimization (DISM)**: Performs DISM Component Cleanup with ResetBase to clean deep Windows system image components (requires time).
*   **Startup Manager**: Inspect and easily enable/disable programs starting up automatically on Windows boot.
*   **Quarantine Manager**: Restore or permanently delete orphaned installer files you've isolated.
*   **Real-time Performance Monitor**: Sleek visual dials tracking CPU and RAM utilization live.
*   **Live PowerShell Console**: Watch execution logs and PowerShell outputs happen in real time.

---

## ⚙️ System Requirements

*   **Operating System**: Windows 10 or Windows 11 (64-bit).
*   **Privileges**: **Administrator Rights** are strongly recommended to allow disabling startup items, managing services (`wuauserv`/`DoSvc`), and purging system-protected folders.

---

## 📦 How to Use (For Users)

1.  Go to the **Releases** page of this repository.
2.  Download the installer executable (`KleanSetup.exe`).
3.  Double-click `KleanSetup.exe` to run the installation wizard.
4.  Follow the prompts to complete the installation.
5.  Right-click the **Klean** shortcut on your Desktop or Start Menu and select **Run as Administrator** (required for deep system optimization).
6.  Enjoy a clean and optimized system!

---

## 🛠️ How to Develop & Build (For Developers)

If you'd like to inspect, modify, or build the source code yourself, follow these steps:

### Prerequisites
*   [Node.js](https://nodejs.org/) (v16+ recommended)
*   Windows PowerShell (standard on Windows 10/11)

### Setup & Run locally
1.  Clone this repository:
    ```bash
    git clone https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/klean-cleaner.git
    cd klean-cleaner/gui
    ```
2.  Install dependencies:
    ```bash
    npm install
    ```
3.  Start the application in development mode:
    ```bash
    npm start
    ```

### Packaging / Building the App
To bundle the application into a standalone portable distribution folder:
```bash
npm run build:win
```
This output folder will be compiled inside `gui/dist/Klean-win32-x64`.

---

## ⚠️ Disclaimer & Warning

*   **Administrator Access**: Spawning system-level operations (like clearing system components or stopping services) requires elevated permissions.
*   **MSI/MSP Quarantine**: Moving installers from `C:\Windows\Installer` might affect the repair or uninstallation of certain software. It is highly recommended to **keep files in quarantine for at least 7 days** before deleting them permanently. If all your apps run normally during this period, you can safely remove them.
*   **DISM Cleanup**: ResetBase prevents you from uninstalling currently installed Windows updates.
